title: sorted ROOT baseline branches versus raw pretrigger pedestals

pre_registered.primary_metric: held-out raw pretrigger median MAE in ADC on runs 57 and 65
pre_registered.split: train on all configured non-held-out/non-calibration runs, calibrate residual means on runs 56 and 64, evaluate only runs 57 and 65
pre_registered.traditional_method: sorted hrd.baseline plus train-run robust residual offsets by stave, peak bin, and amplitude bin
pre_registered.win_rule: lowest held-out MAE; quote paired run-block bootstrap CI for the winner minus the traditional calibrated baseline
